hero.headline: nexus.
hero.subhead: Experience multi-model chat in English and Arabic. Seamlessly switch between DeepSeek, LLaMA, and Mistral.

multiModel.title: Multi-Model
multiModel.body: Access the latest open-source models in one interface. Switch between DeepSeek, LLaMA, and Mistral with a single click.

chatHistory.title: Chat History
chatHistory.body: Your conversations are saved automatically. Pick up right where you left off, anytime, anywhere.

bilingual.title: Bilingual by Default
bilingual.body: Full support for English and Arabic. Switch languages instantly and enjoy perfect RTL support.

summaries.title: Smart Summaries
summaries.body: Get automatic summaries of long conversations. Distilled insights without the noise.

modelSwitching.title: Model Switching
modelSwitching.body: Compare responses from different models. Find the best fit for your needs in real time.

deepseek.description: Fast, accurate reasoning model optimized for practical tasks and coding.

llama.description: Meta's powerful open-source model with excellent general knowledge and creativity.

mistral.description: Efficient and lightweight model with strong instruction-following capabilities.

english.heading: English Interface
english.sample: This is the English interface with perfect accessibility and modern typography.

arabic.heading: واجهة عربية
arabic.sample: هذه واجهة عربية مع دعم كامل للغة العربية والكتابة من اليمين إلى اليسار.

rtl.heading: RTL Layout
rtl.body: Full support for right-to-left languages with automatic layout mirroring.

about.title: About Nexus
body: Nexus is a modern multi-model chatbot platform built for the next generation of users who value choice, transparency, and multilingual support.
We believe in putting users first. That's why we built nexus with open-source models, bilingual support from day one, and the flexibility to switch between providers without friction.
Whether you're researching, coding, writing, or just exploring the possibilities of AI, nexus gives you the tools to do your best work.

auth.signupDescription: Create your account to get started with Nexus Chat
auth.loginDescription: Welcome back! Sign in to your account
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter the code from your email and set a new password
auth.verifyEmailDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email
auth.codeExpired: Code has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.codeExpiredResend: Code expired. Please request a new one.
auth.codeSent: A new code has been sent to your email
auth.emailVerified: Email verified successfully! Please log in.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully! Please log in.
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.resetCodeSentDescription: Check your email for the reset code. Redirecting...
auth.securityWarning: Never share this code with anyone. We will never ask for it via email or phone.
auth.resetTip: Check your spam folder if you don't see the email within a few minutes

forms.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
forms.passwordWeak: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

app.title: Nexus Chat
app.chatDescription: You're authenticated and ready to chat
app.feature1Desc: Your data is encrypted and secure
